words.def: a state of lawlessness and disorder (usually resulting from a failure of government)
words.zh: n. 無政府狀態, 政治混亂

words.def: airtight sealed metal container for food or drink or paint etc.
one or some or every or all without specification
move fast by using one's feet, with one foot off the ground at any given time
a column of light (as from a beacon)
words.zh: n. 光線, 射線, 閃爍, 光輝

words.def: a motor vehicle with four wheels; usually propelled by an internal combustion engine
a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition
words.zh: n. 叫聲, 哭聲, 大叫
